citation: VA M26-7 Chapter 8 — IRRRL flat 0.50% regardless of use-count or down-payment
comment: Hand-calc: $400,000 loan, IRRRL streamline refi. Flat 0.50% IRRRL fee — predicate must IGNORE is_first_use and down_payment_pct (IRRRL has its own flat tier per M26-7). Fee = $400,000 × 0.0050 = $2,000.00.
